summary:
Here is a concise and insightful summary of the call:

The call was abruptly ended by the agent after the user revealed they have a stacked washing machine unit. The agent explained that they don't typically handle stacked units due to the labor-intensive nature of repairing them, and offered to forward the user to a human dispatcher in the future if needed.

pathway_logs.text:
Hey there, this is Appliance AI. Im here to help diagnose exclusively your washing machine currently.
Could you please begin by telling me whether you have a stacked or non stacked unit?

concatenated_transcript:
assistant: Hey there, this is Appliance AI. Im here to help diagnose exclusively your washing machine currently. Could you please begin by telling me whether you have a stacked or non stacked unit? 
 user: I have a stacked unit. 
 agent-action: Ended call 
 assistant: Im sorry but we dont normally handle stacked units as the labor required to move these items around for repair is incredibly strenous. In the future I can forward you directly to a human dispatcher if you are in dire need.

transcripts.text: Hey there, this is Appliance AI. Im here to help diagnose exclusively your washing machine currently. Could you please begin by telling me whether you have a stacked or non stacked unit?

Im sorry but we dont normally handle stacked units as the labor required to move these items around for repair is incredibly strenous. In the future I can forward you directly to a human dispatcher if you are in dire need.
